appliedUpdates.description: oRPC API URL format uses slashes (e.g., /api/rpc/admin/serviceRequests/list) not dots. Request body requires {"json": {...}} wrapper for POST requests.

notes.apiFormat: URL uses slashes: /api/rpc/admin/serviceRequests/list (NOT /api/rpc/admin.serviceRequests.list). POST body requires {"json": {...}} wrapper.
notes.testDataIssue: Test data has service requests without active bookings, preventing full transition testing from booking_held->verified. However, eligibility gate mechanism was verified working correctly.
notes.eligibilityChecks: VAL-SR-010 verified: Eligibility check blocks transition with 400 ELIGIBILITY_FAILED when prerequisites not met.
